author: gansxx
description: Automatically apply configured tags to new notes and supplement tags for files in the current folder. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Automatically apply configured tags to new notes and supplement tags for files in the current folder.
manifest.name: Auto folder tags

name: Auto folder tags

releases.author: gansxx
releases.description: Release pipeline update.\n\nThis release adds GitHub artifact attestations for the published release assets and keeps the supply-chain verification path aligned with the repository workflow.

releases.author: gansxx
releases.description:
Initial release for Auto folder tags.

Includes:
- automatic folder-based tag application for newly created markdown files
- a command to backfill configured tags for markdown files in the current folder
- submission materials and GitHub Actions for future community-plugin releases
